name: yxg
description: Codex adapter for the yxg repository-local workflow kernel.

interface.shortDescription: Intent-level Codex skills for yxg workflow
interface.longDescription: Provides user-facing Codex skills such as /yxg:plan, /yxg:do, /yxg:monitor, /yxg:finish, /yxg:resume, and /yxg:cancel while keeping .yxg as the source of truth.
